commands.summary: Completion queue, timeout, and tombstone tests passed.

tests_covered: Second terminal timeout for same OperationKey is rejected
Late completion after tombstone is discarded
Reserved close/recovery capacity is represented in registry capacity policy
allowed_operations_checked: Tombstone table and timeout hierarchy added
forbidden_operations_checked: No duplicate terminal timeout evidence for same OperationKey
Timed-out operation is not revived by late completion
